title: Shiny End Crystals
description: Makes End Crystals shiny and crystal-y!
body:
The end crystal texture is fine (if a bit outdated imo), but it could be better! This pack makes end crystals look more crystal-y and shiny. (Somewhat inspired by [The Great Shrimpsby](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/the-great-shrimpsby)'s end crystal texture(minus the custom model))

Optifine NOT required; Just download and play! ^w^

(shaders used in screenshots are Complementary Reimagined)
